brand.name: GiggFi Live
brand.headline: The website version of your artist-booking app, ready for discovery, enquiries, and conversion.
brand.subheadline: Built for weddings, private parties, colleges, hotels, and corporate events with a client flow and an artist ops view.

services.title: Wedding programming
services.summary: Premium singers, bands, DJs, anchors, and choreography-led acts for multi-event wedding calendars.

services.title: Corporate entertainment
services.summary: Stage hosts, clean comedians, live bands, and polished acts that feel brand-safe and high-energy.

services.title: Private celebrations
services.summary: Fast-turnaround talent curation for intimate and social events where vibe, timing, and budget matter.

phases.name: Phase 1
phases.headline: Brand, trust, and discovery
phases.detail: Visitors understand what you do, browse categories, and shortlist artists without friction.

phases.name: Phase 2
phases.headline: Live booking intake
phases.detail: Event briefs move into a backend-backed booking pipeline so you can collect and track leads.

phases.name: Phase 3
phases.headline: Operations and scale
phases.detail: Admin tools, artist logins, payments, CRM, and production workflows can layer on top of the same backend.

examplePages.title: Homepage
examplePages.summary: Luxury-first hero, category cards, trust proof, and a direct enquiry CTA.

examplePages.title: Artist discovery
examplePages.summary: Filterable artist cards by city and category with pricing, format, and quality signals.

examplePages.title: Booking brief
examplePages.summary: A real form connected to the backend so web visitors become trackable leads.

examplePages.title: Ops console
examplePages.summary: A lightweight website-side dashboard that shows submitted bookings and current lead status.

testimonials.name: Ritika S.
testimonials.quote: We found the right singer and emcee in one pass, and the brief looked client-ready immediately.

testimonials.name: Arjun K.
testimonials.quote: The shortlisting experience is fast, premium, and easy to hand over internally.

testimonials.name: Studio Noor
testimonials.quote: The website feels like a polished front door for the app instead of a disconnected marketing page.

artists.name: Aman Bedi
artists.tagline: Bilingual host for polished event flow

artists.name: Rohit Bawa
artists.tagline: Clean comedy for mixed and corporate audiences
